text: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.
zh: 我正在一家餐厅吃饭，托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。

text: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago,
zh: 托尼几年前在一家律师事务所工作，

text: but he is now working at a bank.
zh: 但他现在在一家银行上班。

text: but he always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back.
zh: 但他总是向朋友借钱，而且从不还钱。

text: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table.
zh: 托尼看见我，就走过来坐在了同一张桌子旁。

text: He has never borrowed money from me.
While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.
zh: 他吃饭的时候，我请他借给我二十英镑。

text: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.
zh: 让我惊讶的是，他立刻就把钱给了我。

text: 'I have never borrowed any money from you,'
Tony said, 'so now you can pay for my dinner!'
zh: 托尼说，“所以现在你可以替我付晚餐钱了！”
